docket_entries.description: JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR SURGERY OFFICES ASSIGNED TO CSC CREDIT SERVICES, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $380.00 FILED BY SURGERY OFFICES AS TO DEFENDANT DILLARD SUSAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-29-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 04
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DILLARD SUSAN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SURGERY OFFICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DILLARD SUSAN $380.00 PRINCIPAL, $56.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $436.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CSC CREDIT SERVICES INC. SUBSTITUTES ARTURO MATTHEWS AS ATTY OF RECORD IN PLACE OF MILTON WEISS, OF JACKSON,LUBARSKY & WEISS.
